name: PennEast Pipeline Co. v. New Jersey
question: Does the Natural Gas Act delegate the federal government’s eminent-domain power, and does it abrogate state sovereign immunity in such cases?
description: A case in which the Court will decide whether the Natural Gas Act delegates to Federal Energy Regulatory Commission certificate-holders the authority to exercise the federal government’s eminent-domain power to condemn land in which a state claims an interest, and whether it also abrogates state sovereign immunity in such cases.
